name: allocate_ids_never_collide
code:
proof fn phi_4_allocate_ids_never_collide(a1: ReconcileIdAllocator, a2: ReconcileIdAllocator)
    requires
        a1.reconcile_id_counter != a2.reconcile_id_counter,
    ensures
        a1.allocate().0.allocate().1 != a2.allocate().1,
{
}
reason: a1 allocates twice yielding counter+1, a2 allocates once yielding its counter — if a1.counter+1 == a2.counter they collide, so distinct initial counters do NOT prevent collision after different numbers of allocations
